examples.title: File Reading with Error Checking
examples.description: Demonstrates proper file opening with error handling
examples.explanation: Shows proper file opening with is_open() check, reading lines with getline(), and checking stream state with eof() and fail() to determine why reading stopped.

examples.title: Stringstream Conversion Example
examples.description: Converts between strings and numbers using stringstream
examples.explanation: Demonstrates three uses: converting numbers to formatted strings, parsing strings into numbers, and tokenizing strings using custom delimiters.

examples.title: Random Access in Binary File
examples.description: Shows random access reading and writing using seek functions
examples.explanation: Demonstrates binary file I/O with seekp/seekg for random access. Uses sizeof(Student) to calculate record positions for direct access to any record.

examples.title: Using Stream Manipulators
examples.explanation: Shows common manipulators: setw for width, left/right for alignment, setfill for fill character, fixed/scientific for floating-point notation, hex/dec/oct for base, boolalpha for boolean display.
